message:
Use prefix-tree analysis to extract last path component from encoded project names

When sibling encoded dirs share a common prefix (e.g. -Users-jesse-prime-radiant
and -Users-jesse-prime-radiant-scribble), use the longest matching prefix to
extract just the final component (scribble) instead of everything after the
user prefix (prime-radiant-scribble).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
